disclaimer: Honest. None is an ERPNext clone or ERPNext-compatible. Gains are real but modest in parity; the structural wins are the data-driven generator, accounting depth, knowledge base, and module breadth.

howBuilt.v4: generated (expanded data-driven spec + LLM + knowledge-usage report)

v4VsV3.note: V4 expands the document flow (selling/buying/inventory/HR/projects) via the spec and adds a generator knowledge-usage report. Engine depth (P&L/Balance Sheet) carried from V3.

verdict: V4 > V3: +3% parity (45%), +2% production-grade (50%), +14 tests (122), 22 modules vs 15, plus a knowledge-usage report proving the generator catalogues the ERP knowledge packs. Still PILOT-grade. ERPNext remains far larger; the remaining distance is documented, not faked.
